diagram_title: Mobile Session Restructure — Functional Decomposition (simplified, no diff viewer)

activities.title: Generate slim file-diff at end of turn
activities.description: Workflow runner queries git for additions/deletions/status per file. Never reads file bodies into buffers. Writes slim FileDiff[] to user message summary.diffs.

activities.title: Persist slim message record
activities.description: Existing Storage.write path writes the message info.json. Because the in-memory shape has no before/after fields, the disk representation is automatically slim.

activities.title: Serve session reads (slim payload)
activities.description: HTTP message routes, SSE bus.message.updated, share export all return the slim shape unchanged from disk. Clients render metadata-only views. No diff viewer path exists server-side.

activities.title: Server-side owned-diff via git
activities.description: Workspace owned-diff check calls git directly (git show against the message snapshot commit) when it needs to compare file content with worktree state. No shared helper; inline call.

activities.title: Migrate historical sessions (one-shot)
activities.description: Maintenance script walks session/ directory, rewrites each message info.json to slim shape (strip before/after), writes per-session marker. Atomic per-file (temp + rename). Idempotent (marker skips).

activities.title: UI renders metadata rows only
activities.description: Desktop review tab, shared SessionReview component, enterprise share page — all render one row per changed file: path, additions, deletions, status. No expand button, no diff content fetch.

arrows.label: Schema definition: FileDiff has no before/after
Filesystem walk + atomic rename + structured logger
